## CHANGELOG.md:1013-1017
1013: - `arg!(--flag <value>)` is now optional, instead of required.  Add `.required(true)` at the end to restore the original behavior (#4206)
1014: - Added default feature flags, `help`, `usage` and `error-context`, requiring adding them back in if `default-features = false` (#4236)
1015: - *(parser)* Always fill in `""` argument for external subcommands to make it easier to distinguish them from built-in commands (#3263)
1016: - *(parser)* Short flags now have higher precedence than hyphen values with `Arg::allow_hyphen_values`, to be consistent with `Command::allow_hyphen_values` (#4187)
1017: - *(parser)* `Arg::value_terminator` must be its own argument on the CLI rather than being in a delimited list (#4025)

## CHANGELOG.md:1139-1143
1139: - *(help)* Quote the suggested help flag (#4220)
1140: - *(version)* Use `Command::display_name` rather than `Command::bin_name` (#3966)
1141: - *(parser)* Always fill in `""` argument for external subcommands (#3263)
1142: - *(parser)* Short flags now have higher precedence than hyphen values with `Arg::allow_hyphen_values`, like `Command::allow_hyphen_values` (#4187)
1143: - *(parser)* Prefer `InvalidSubcommand` over `UnknownArgument` in more cases (#4219)
